# Function: isToolkitEntry()

```ts
function isToolkitEntry(value: unknown): value is ToolkitEntry;

```

Type guard for `ToolkitEntry` ‚Äî used by the agents plugin to differentiate toolkit references from inline tools in a mixed `tools` record.
